document.description: The unchanged input StanzaAnnotationResult. This local definition mirrors schema/stanza_annotator.v2.0.schema.json to avoid weak document objects in output validation.

StanzaAnnotationResultConsumedSubset.description: Strict consumed subset of StanzaAnnotationResult v2.0 used by annotation_quality_filter. Additional upstream-owned fields are allowed, but consumed fields are typed and required where traversed.

ConsumedTextUnitRef.description: Consumed TextUnitRef emitted by stanza_annotator.v2.0. Paragraph refs are forbidden; main chapter content is chapter_text.

AnnotationQualityDebugInfo.description: Safe, redacted debug-only information. Must not contain full input text, raw input dumps, absolute filesystem paths, secrets, or tracebacks.
